archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified with brand green tones

headings.usage: Use for massive prices, totals, and the 'Cobrar Orden' button. Letter-spacing tight.

body.usage: Use for product names, labels, and admin table data.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use sharp borders (rounded-md max) and high-contrast lines. No soft shadows. Rely on 2px solid borders for active states.
visual_enhancers.effects: Since there is no hover, active states must be immediate. Use bg-green-900 text-white for selected payment methods. Use 2px #006400 border for unselected but actionable items.
visual_enhancers.icons: NO EXTERNAL ICONS. Rely purely on typography (e.g., massive '+' and '-' symbols, uppercase labels).

buttons.primary: Massive height (min-h-[5rem] / h-20), bg-[#006400] text-white font-black text-2xl uppercase tracking-wider. Active state: bg-[#228B22].
buttons.secondary: h-16 border-2 border-[#006400] text-[#006400] font-bold text-lg. Active state: bg-[#006400] text-white.
buttons.quantity: Square blocks w-16 h-16 flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-100 text-3xl font-black active:bg-gray-300 rounded-md

cards.product: bg-white p-4 flex items-center justify-between border-b-2 border-gray-100 active:bg-gray-50

inputs.text: h-16 border-2 border-gray-200 px-4 text-xl font-bold focus:border-[#006400] focus:ring-0 outline-none rounded-md

pos_screen.list_area: Flex-1 overflow-y-auto pb-4 pt-4 px-4 space-y-2 bg-[#F4F4F5].
pos_screen.cart_panel: Fixed bottom, w-full bg-white border-t-4 border-[#006400] p-4 flex flex-col gap-4 shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] z-50.

admin_screen.structure: Container mx-auto p-4 md:p-8 space-y-8 bg-[#F4F4F5] min-h-screen

motion.rules: Zero hover animations. Only instant state changes or extremely fast active transforms (scale 0.98 on press) for tactile feedback.

accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 64px height for all interactive elements.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure green #006400 on white passes WCAG AAA for large text.
accessibility.test_ids: CRITICAL: All buttons, inputs, and interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='btn-add-taco', data-testid='input-tip').

media_urls.rules: No external images or icons requested. Pure typographical UI.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard .js React components. NO TYPESCRIPT.
POS View: Implement a sticky bottom panel for the cart and checkout button that stays visible while scrolling the product list.
Product Item: Render vertically, each with name and a quantity control block (+, number, -).
Quantity Control: The number must be an editable text input to allow fast typing for large orders.
Payment Selector: 3 large buttons (Efectivo, Transferencia, Tarjeta). If Transferencia or Tarjeta is selected, show an input field for PROPINA (Tip).
Admin View: Create a dashboard with 3 Chart.js graphs (Products bar chart, Sales over time line/bar, Payment method pie chart).
Admin Table: Show a simple data table of today's sales and an editable price list.
Ensure total sums in the POS cart are massive (text-5xl or text-6xl) using the 'Cabinet Grotesk' font stack if possible, otherwise high-weight sans.
DO NOT USE LUICIDE ICONS OR ANY EXTERNAL ICONS. Use pure typography (e.g. text for '+', '-', 'Efectivo').
